assistant_content_excerpt:
Yes in principle, but **with the currently available workflow inputs, not directly from SharePoint or Outlook yet**.

Right now the available direct inputs are:

- CSV / JSON / text files
- Azure Blob Storage
- Dataverse
- Azure Blob as a cloud file source

I do **not** see a listed SharePoint, Microsoft Graph, Outlook mailbox, or records-management-library input connector in this composer. So I should not claim we can read directly from those locations unless your IT team exposes them through o
